title: Summary Surface Retirement Planning Baseline Evidence

notes: Planning baseline evidence refreshed at 2026-03-13T01:48:55Z for trace.summary_surface_retirement after retiring the root summary surface, deleting the dedicated continuity trace, rewriting the direct dependency chain, fixing the validation-exposed traceability-sync unit-test brittleness, syncing derived artifacts, completing acceptance-inclusive validation, closing the initiative, and confirming that no surviving repo-local markdown link or repository-path entry targets SUMMARY.md.
